title: DefectLevelThresNeg Property
description: Sets / returns the negative defect level threshold.
notes:
DefectLevelThreshNeg is the threshold in pixels for a defect under the line or arc being inspected.  During inspection, if the defect level of a defect candidate is greater then DefectLevelThreshNeg and less than DefectLevelThreshPos, then the candidate is not considered to be a defect.

See Also: DefectLevelThresNeg Property

DefectLevelThresPos Property
